title: Nigel Farage invests in crypto firm led by Kwasi Kwarteng
description: Nigel Farage has invested £215,000 in crypto firm Stack BTC, chaired by former chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng, securing a 6.3% stake in the bitcoin-focused company.Read more: Nigel Farage invests in crypto firm led by Kwasi Kwarteng

title: 32,000 Bitcoin (BTC) moves to cold storage as Mutuum Finance (MUTM) implements dual-lending mechanism
description: Crypto exchange outflows have recently spiked dramatically, with nearly 32,000 BTC, valued at approximately $2.26 billion, leaving trading platforms in just one day. On March 3, Bitfinex alone experienced its largest single-day withdrawal since June 2025, recording an outflow of around 25,000 BTC alone.  This “anomalous” event could signal large holders moving assets into cold […]

title: Circle’s 10% Gain Monday Outpaces MSTR and COIN in Big Day for Crypto Stocks
description: Shares of Circle Internet Group (CRCL) closed up roughly 10% on Monday, with the stock sitting at $111.84 as of the close. That move puts CRCL well ahead of its crypto-adjacent peers today, outpacing both MicroStrategy (MSTR) and Coinbase (COIN) in a session where broader crypto sentiment got a modest lift from Bitcoin.
